what_it_does: A read-only exhaustive landscape capture ('dragnet') of the Company's design/ folder (121 files): the token registry, the ui:// address system, the blueprint/J-surface build-spec, the view/mockup register, the _system machinery scripts, the FE/backend CONNECTION-CONTRACT, and a catalogue of gaps/stale/surprising content. Evidence is given as file paths throughout.
observations: Frames design/ as not-documentation but a self-describing substrate: two registries (tokens.json=look, addresses.json=ui:// address system), a grounded mockup corpus, and a machine-readable build-spec a fresh session can build to.

Token system: tokens.json (72 tokens, 1 primitive 'gold' #e6ab5c) generates design-system.css; gold-primary warm theme locked 2026-06-07; commander's-bridge type system (Fraunces/Bricolage/IBM Plex Mono+Sans).

Address system: addresses.json holds 504 registered ui:// addresses across 31 regions; grammar ui://<region>/<element>[/<sub>][/@state]; second scheme run://<graph>/<node>; 16 of 31 regions have no React component yet (PLANNED).
blueprint/ is GENERATED by blueprint_emit.py; directory=journey spine, address-refs=web; surfaces grouped into journeys J1-J9 plus _unrouted/.

View inventory (register.json): 43 views — 9 quality-passed (21%), 33 planned, 1 redo-pre-audit (A2 carries fiction); 76 features across 7 areas A-G; 9 journey sequences, 4 spine journeys all planned.

_system machinery: 9 scripts each with a generated output and a regression test (emit/parse/gallery/check/refcheck/symbols/codeedges/blueprint_emit/navgraph); mechanisms.json registers 3 (refcheck/symbols/codeedges).
CONNECTION-CONTRACT.md tags each concern IS vs SHOULD-BE (grammar, state read, command, governance, context, locus); 7 NODE_STATES, 7 whitelisted verbs; click INDICATES+CONSENTS, does not execute.

Explicitly flags design/ as a SYNCED READ-COPY of canonical build-prep/design/ (Windows-side) — hand-edits silently overwritten; this AREA file deliberately written to build-prep/company-landscape/ instead.

Catalogues concrete check-report findings: 31 literals should use var(), 27 candidate colour tokens, 6 coverage gaps, 1 refcheck drift (suite.py:349 NODE-ports), 45 unused addresses, 940 element candidates.
standouts: Extend-by-registration discipline: all three registries (tokens/addresses/mechanisms) use the same add-entry-run-script pattern — the Company's fractal registry architecture turned onto its own design corpus.
SCENARIO-PLAYER.html is named as the source the gold-primary theme was derived FROM — tokens were realised to match it.

D-1 reconciliation (2026-06-07): views[].status is authority over produced[].status; gallery.py trusts produced, so 7 over-claimed wave-1 entries were reconciled down — a documented integrity rule between two parallel status fields.
conventions: Follows the repo's never-assert / coverage-honesty discipline: every count is sourced to a generated report file; explicit about being read-only and about the read-copy hazard.
Follows registry-is-truth: treats tokens/addresses/mechanisms as data registries with generated outputs, not hand-maintained code.
Uses GENERATED-marker discipline (design-system.css, element-map.json, index.html, blueprint/ all marked GENERATED — never hand-edit).
concerns: Self-flags that it documents a synced read-copy — the captured paths/counts describe a mirror that can drift from the canonical Windows-side source.
Several counts are reported from a single check-report.json run; the doc gives a snapshot, not a live figure.
33 of 43 views planned and all 4 spine storyboards planned — the doc records that the corpus is mostly unbuilt against its own quality bar.
notes: If briefing someone: this is the map of the Company's design corpus — token registry, 504-address ui:// system, generated blueprint build-spec, and a register where only 9/43 views are quality-passed; note design/ is a read-copy of the canonical build-prep/design/.
questions: Are the reported counts (504 addresses, 72 tokens, 43 views) current, or from the snapshot date — what regenerates this AREA file when the registries change?
Since design/ is a read-copy, does the canonical build-prep/design/ carry the same gaps the check-report records here?
Is the 1339-commits-ahead / sync mechanism between Windows-side and this copy automatic or manual?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches. Stated as an exhaustive read-only dragnet of design/; the body delivers a section-by-section capture with counts and file-path evidence and a gaps catalogue, exactly as scoped.
apparent_themes: Design corpus as self-describing substrate (the system's face turned on itself)
Coverage honesty — never claim completeness not verified
IS-vs-SHOULD-BE seam between corpus and live app
intention_signals: Trying to give an agent a complete, evidence-grounded mental model of the design layer so it can build to the blueprint spec without reading 121 files — and to make the stale/gap/read-copy hazards explicit up front so no agent edits the wrong copy or trusts an over-claimed status.
novelty: The framing of a design corpus as a fractal application of the same registry mechanism to its own face, plus the documented two-field status-authority reconciliation (views authority, gallery trusts produced) is an unusual integrity discipline.
contribution: Contributes the consolidated map of the design/token/address layer: the ui:// address grammar with 504 addresses across 31 regions, the token registry shape, the generated blueprint build-spec structure, the FE-backend CONNECTION-CONTRACT IS/SHOULD-BE table, and the read-copy-vs-canonical sync fact — the design-side counterpart to the runtime/contracts captures.
summary_for_embedding: Exhaustive landscape capture of the Company's design/ folder: a 72-token registry, a 504-address ui:// system across 31 regions, a generated blueprint build-spec, a 43-view mockup register (9 quality-passed), nine _system scripts, the FE/backend CONNECTION-CONTRACT, and a gaps catalogue.
intention_for_embedding: To give an agent a complete evidence-grounded model of the Company's design corpus and ui:// address layer so it can build to the blueprint spec without reading every file, with stale/read-copy hazards flagged.
